page_content:
ANSC450 Animal Breeding Plans (3 Credits)

Design of animal breeding programs for the genetic improvement of livestock and companion animal species. Principles of population

and quantitative genetics. Genetic evaluations of animals, selection strategies and crossbreeding systems. Incorporation of statistics and biotechnology into animal breeding plans.

Prerequisite: ANSC101; and 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (MATH120, MATH136, MATH140, or BIOM301).

Restriction: Junior standing or higher.
